meta.title: Mundiales de Fútbol
meta.description: The definitive encyclopedia of the FIFA Men's World Cup (1930–2026): results, squads, minute-by-minute events, referees, stadiums and coverage in five languages.

hero.subtitle: The definitive encyclopedia of the FIFA World Cup, down to the last pass.
hero.videoFallbackAlt: A football stadium seen from above

countdown.label: In
countdown.liveNow: The World Cup has kicked off

encyclopedia.title: Encyclopedia
encyclopedia.text: Squads, referees, stadiums, attendance and events for every World Cup match in history.

editorial.title: Storytelling
editorial.text: Long reads, videos and reports that tell the why behind the numbers.

interactive.title: Interactive
interactive.text: Player comparators, simulators, quizzes and a prediction game for 2026.

footer.tagline: A living library of the FIFA World Cup.
footer.credits: Built on open data from FIFA, Wikipedia, StatsBomb and contributors. Imagery via Wikimedia Commons.

contact.title: Write to us
contact.intro: A correction, new data, a collaboration proposal, or want to exercise your data-protection rights? This form lands straight in our inbox.

form.consent: I have read and accept the
form.successBody: Your message arrived. We will reply in the coming days.
form.errorRateLimit: Too many submissions from your IP. Try again later.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Try again in a few minutes.

cookies.title: This site uses cookies
cookies.intro: We use strictly necessary cookies for the site to work and, if you agree, analytics cookies to measure usage. None are shared with advertisers.

necessary.title: Necessary
necessary.desc: Essential for the site to work. Cannot be turned off.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.desc: Help us understand which pages matter. Anonymous and aggregated.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.desc: We don't use any marketing cookies today.
